compounds.frequency: once or twice per 2-week period (low frequency during bloodwork)

benefits.description: Felt a slight increase in body composition and muscle building capability
Expected improvement in recovery from training

side_effects.description: Concerned about head and gut side effects at higher doses, swollen fingers, water retention, higher BP at 4iu+

protocol_notes: Also on TRT 100mg/week. Currently planning to titrate HGH up slowly from 2iu daily to 4iu daily with frequent bloodwork. Previously took CJC-IPA (assumed CJC-1295/Ipamorelin blend) for ~4 months. Concerned about cancer risk and acromegaly from higher HGH doses. Interested in minimizing total compounds to just testosterone and HGH.
